[Date]
From: [Sender Name]
[Title] | [Company] | [Address] | [City] | [State] | [Zip]
To: [Recipient Name]
[Title] | [Company] | [Address] | [City] | [State] | [Zip]
Dear [Recipient Name]:
My name is [YOUR FULL NAME].
We’re searching for businesses in the [SECTOR NAME HERE] sector who are thinking of selling,
getting ready to retire or would entertain a conversation about selling their businesses.
I’m part of a venture to acquire one or several businesses in this space.
Ideally, it would be [REVENUE SIZE OF BUSINESS YOU’RE LOOKING FOR HERE] and
located in the [GEOGRAPHIC AREA].
I am not asking for any specific tenant names from you.
However, if you do have tenants who fit the profile above -- especially tenants who are not renewing
their commercial leases -- I would appreciate it if you could mention the opportunity to them.
If you’d like to contact me about this opportunity, here is my contact information:
[YOUR PHONE NUMBER]
[YOUR PROFESSIONAL EMAIL ADDRESS]
Sincerely,
[SIGNATURE]
[Your Name]
[Title]
